page_subtitle: Club tees, race jerseys and supporter gear. Pickup at the Eagles Nest or shipped Australia-wide.
info_banner: **Free pickup at the Eagles Nest** on Tuesday gate nights · Standard shipping Australia-wide $10 · Race jerseys are made-to-order via ACE1 (allow 4-6 weeks) · All proceeds support the club.

products.name: Maroondah BMX Club Tee — Black
products.description: Classic black tee with the club logo, front and back print. Soft cotton, 100% machine washable.

products.name: Maroondah BMX Club Tee — White
products.description: Crisp white version of the club tee. Same logo, same comfy cotton, summer-friendly.

products.name: Eastfield Eagles Race Jersey
products.description: Personalised long-sleeve race jersey from ACE1. Custom name and number on the back. Made-to-order, 4-6 week lead time.

products.name: Eagles Trucker Cap
products.description: Snapback trucker cap with embroidered Eagles logo on the front. Classic black with mesh back panels — coming soon.

products.name: Eagles Beanie
products.description: Warm acrylic beanie with embroidered logo cuff. Perfect for cold winter gate nights at the track.

products.name: Eagles Race Jacket
products.description: Lightweight track jacket with full Eagles branding. Water-resistant, perfect for race days and warm-ups.

footer_note: All proceeds support track maintenance and club programs
